actions.title: Temporary block source IP
steps: Verify block is active via connection test
actions.risk: May block legitimate traffic if IP is shared/NAT

actions.title: Rate limit SSH service
steps: Configure rate limit on tcp/22 to 10 conn/min
rollback: Remove rate limit rule on tcp/22
actions.risk: May slow down legitimate remote access

actions.title: Enable SSH key-only authentication
steps: Distribute SSH keys to authorized users
